spec_match.rationale: The page now exercises `focus({ focusVisible: true/false })`, default focus, `preventScroll`, newly focused activeElement state, and whether the target matches `:focus-visible`.

interactive.rationale: Visitors can run explicit focus option buttons, use arrow-key menu navigation, click menu items, and inspect live focus metrics and logs.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Feature-index blurb and page H1/lede share the same framing and surface the same API affordances.

edge_cases.rationale: The support probe checks observable true versus false behavior instead of only relying on no-throw detection, and the page logs fallback/error paths plus default focus behavior.

references.rationale: see-also section links to https://chromestatus.com/feature/5612989944299520 so the cleanup script can recover this folder.

design_system.rationale: The new controls use shared CSS variables, paired button background and color, responsive grid constraints, and textContent-based readouts.

summary: Converted the keyboard-vs-mouse concept into an explicit focusVisible playground with observable `:focus-visible` metrics, menu modality controls, and corrected support detection.
